admin.aiAssistant.empty: Type a request or use a shortcut.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.alerts.descripti: Describe the topic and the assistant will draft title and message automatically. If dates are omitted, the alert is active immediately. If you specify a time range, it is scheduled automatically.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.alerts.example1: Create an alert announcing a new premium color service.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.alerts.example2: Warn about closure at {locationFromWithDefinite} this Saturday afternoon.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.alerts.example3: Create an informational alert to wish clients happy Valentine’s Day.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.alerts.example4: Activate a notice alert for two days starting tomorrow.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.alerts.title: Alerts: announcements and updates
admin.aiAssistant.guide.appointments.des: Write naturally. Exact phrasing is not required. Service is mandatory. If you do not specify {staffSingularLabel}, the least busy one is assigned automatically. If the client does not exist, a guest is created.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.appointments.exa: Create an appointment for Marta Sancho tomorrow afternoon with classic cut and {staffNameExample}
Book Carlos Lopez as soon as possible for beard grooming.
Appointment for client Luis Martinez this Tuesday at 10:00 with classic cut and {staffNameExampleAlt}.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.appointments.tit: Appointments: what and how to ask
admin.aiAssistant.guide.audio.descriptio: Press the microphone to dictate and press again to stop. If you say "{command}" at the end, the message is sent automatically. Otherwise, transcription is kept in the input for review before sending. You can also listen to any assistant reply.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.audio.title: Audio and playback: hands-free
admin.aiAssistant.guide.holidays.descrip: You can create holidays for {locationDefiniteSingular} or for one or several {staffPluralLabel}. If scope is not specified, {locationSingularLower} is assumed. You can use single dates, ranges, and multiple holidays in one message.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.holidays.example: Create a holiday for {locationDefiniteSingular} next Tuesday.
Holiday from the 15th to the 18th this month for Alejandro and Pablo.
Create one holiday for {locationDefiniteSingular} on the 5th and another from March 8 to 10 for Ana.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.holidays.title: Flexible holidays: {locationSingularLower}, {staffPluralLabel} and ranges
admin.aiAssistant.guide.subtitle: How to request tasks in a simple way.
admin.aiAssistant.guide.title: Assistant quick guide
admin.aiAssistant.subtitle: Speak naturally and complete tasks in seconds.

admin.dashboard.infoDialog.description: Quick guide to read this chart.
admin.dashboard.losses.info.1: Each bar corresponds to a day of the week. The higher it is, the more incidents there were.
admin.dashboard.losses.info.2: "No-shows" are clients who did not attend; "Cancelled" are appointments that were called off.
admin.dashboard.losses.info.3: If one day stands out, reinforce reminders, ask for a deposit, or adjust that day's schedule to reduce losses.
admin.dashboard.losses.subtitle: Distribution by weekday (last 30 days).
admin.dashboard.losses.title: No-shows and cancellations
admin.dashboard.occupancy.info.1: Columns are days and rows are hours. The stronger the color, the more appointments in that slot.
admin.dashboard.occupancy.info.2: It helps you quickly spot peak hours and real gaps.
admin.dashboard.occupancy.info.3: Data is calculated from the last 30 days for a more realistic view.
